source: Appendix A, PAI Professional Manual, 2nd ed. (Morey, 2007)
description: T-Score conversion tables for all PAI scales and subscales from the Census-Matched Standardization Sample (N=1,000).

ARD-O._note: ARD-O max raw score may be lower than 24 depending on item count; null entries indicate no value in the conversion table.

MAN-I._note: MAN-I max raw score may be lower than 24 depending on item count; null entries indicate no value in the conversion table.

SCZ-T._note: SCZ-T max raw score may be lower than 24 depending on item count; null entries indicate no value in the conversion table.
